objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/codex/proofs']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:20 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem872_execute_bem871_route.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps in ['record_proven_ready','smoke_response_approved']:
    status='next_record_claude_action_proven'
    next_action='record claude-code-action@v1 proven and continue operating loop'
elif ps in ['extract_blocker_ready','smoke_response_blocked']:
    status='next_extract_blocker_and_repair'
    next_action='extract non-secret blocker and patch next'
elif ps=='second_tick_required':
    status='next_run_second_tick'
    next_action='run one more tick then verify smoke runtime and response'
elif ps=='response_writer_patch_required':
    status='next_patch_response_writer'
    next_action='patch smoke response writer and retry dispatch'
elif ps=='token_env_patch_required':
    status='next_patch_token_env'
    next_action='patch queue processor token env/secret source'
elif ps=='dispatch_target_patch_required':
    status='next_patch_dispatch_target'
    next_action='patch workflow target name/ref/permissions'
elif ps=='dispatch_processing_diagnosis_required':
    status='next_diagnose_dispatch_processing'
    next_action='inspect queue processor/result files/target workflow visibility'
else:
    status='next_diagnose_unknown_smoke_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-872 status '+str(ps)
state={'bem':'BEM-873','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem873_route_after_bem872.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem873_route_after_bem872.md').write_text('# BEM-873 | Route After BEM-872 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem873_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Continue Claude Code Action track until result.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-873'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem873_route_after_bem872','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem873_route_after_bem872.txt').write_text('BEM-873 '+status+' previous='+ps+'\n')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem873_route_after_bem872.json','governance/reports/bem873_route_after_bem872.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem873_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl','governance/codex/proofs/bem873_route_after_bem872.txt'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-872 smoke status toward proven record, blocker repair, second tick, or dispatch repair')
